## What does this change?

A short description of what you changed and why.

## How did you test it?

Tell us how you checked that it works. For example:

- [ ] Ran `./build.sh` and the app opened.
- [ ] Tried each awake state from the menu.
- [ ] Tested the lid closed state and confirmed normal sleep came back after.
- [ ] Code compiles with `swiftc -O -o /tmp/macowl main.swift`.

## Anything else?

Screenshots, notes, or things the reviewer should look at carefully.
